assertions.text: Response includes a curl command targeting graph.facebook.com with /media endpoint
assertions.reasoning: The LLM output includes a curl command in Step 2 that targets 'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/${INSTAGRAM_ACCOUNT_ID}/media', which is the graph.facebook.com domain with the /media endpoint.

assertions.text: Response includes image_url=https://mycdn.com/photo.jpg in a code block
assertions.reasoning: The LLM output includes a code block in Step 2 that contains 'image_url=https://mycdn.com/photo.jpg' as a parameter in the curl command.

assertions.text: Response includes a /media_publish endpoint call to finalize the post
assertions.reasoning: The output includes a curl POST call to 'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/${INSTAGRAM_ACCOUNT_ID}/media_publish' in Step 3, which is exactly the /media_publish endpoint call used to finalize/publish the Instagram post.

assertions.text: Response references INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN and INSTAGRAM_ACCOUNT_ID variables
assertions.reasoning: The LLM output explicitly references both INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN and INSTAGRAM_ACCOUNT_ID variables multiple times throughout the response, including in the export commands, curl API calls, and .env file instructions.

actionItems.summary: The instagram-poster skill consistently outperforms baseline with a +1.5 delta and 100% assertion pass rate; it delivers well-structured, actionable Instagram publishing workflows. No changes are needed.
weaknesses: Only one eval case was run ('post single image'), leaving carousel, video/reels, and scheduling scenarios untested — pass rate of 100% may not generalize.
The SKILL.md content is truncated in the report, so the Step 2+ workflow completeness cannot be fully assessed from this data.
strengths: Perfect assertion pass rate (4/4) on the single tested case demonstrates accurate, spec-compliant output.
Structure score of 5/5 vs baseline 3/5 shows the skill produces significantly better-organized responses with clear step-by-step commands.
Content score of 4/5 vs baseline 3/5 confirms richer, more actionable guidance — not just cosmetic formatting improvement.
Delta of +1.5 comfortably clears the 'keep' threshold of >+1.
actionItems.suggestedFocus: Expand evals to cover carousel (multi-image) and Reels publishing cases to confirm the skill's 100% pass rate holds across all supported content types.
